channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Alila Mayakoba is now open in Mexico — and you can book from 21,000 Hyatt points
item.description: Here's what we know about the now-open Alila Mayakoba.

item.title: Exercise Benefits for a Faster Metabolism
item.description: More intense workouts can temporarily raise your metabolic rate. Learn how exercise affects metabolism and which workouts have the greatest impact.

item.title: I earned points paying my mortgage via Bilt — how to set up your account to do the same
item.description: I paid my mortgage via Bilt and earned 3,000 points. Here are the steps to take to set up your account to start earning rewards on housing payments.

item.title: Frontier Airlines exits 10 cities, slows growth to achieve profits
item.description: After a net loss of $137 million in 2025, Frontier Airlines is making changes in order to grow its profits.

item.title: EVA Air to launch Washington, DC's first-ever nonstop flight to Taiwan
item.description: EVA Air will connect Washington, D.C., with Taipei, Taiwan, beginning in July.

item.title: Reasons Why Women Experience Hair Thinning
Southwest unveils 7 new routes covering 10 cities — and new Costa Rica service
item.description: Southwest Airlines added more than a half-dozen routes as it extended its schedule through October, including new international flights to Costa Rica.

item.title: How HIV Affects Older Adults Differently
Highly Fatal Virus May Finally Be Treatable with First Vaccine–Clinical Trials Starting
item.description: In January, India recorded a mini-outbreak of the Nipah virus, an often lethal disease spread by contact between humans and animals. There was little ...

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: ICE’s Secret Expansion Plans, Palantir Workers’ Ethical Concerns, and AI Assistants
item.description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, our hosts dive into WIRED’s scoop about a secret Trump administration campaign extending right into your backyard.

item.title: Good News in History, February 12
item.description: 25 years ago today, the Near Earth Asteroid Rendezvous (NEAR) – Shoemaker spacecraft successfully orbited and landed on the asteroid Eros 433, a first...

item.title: Woman’s Prosthetic Leg Swept Out to Sea Is Thrilled its Been Found 10 Months Later
item.description: A woman whose new prosthetic leg was swept out to sea is “over the moon” after she found it 10 months later, it having been swept right back to the be...

item.title: Anthropic raises another $30B in Series G, with a new value of $380B
item.description: The infusion of funding for the AI startup takes place as it is vying for customers and cultural attention with its competitor, OpenAI.

item.title: YouTube finally launches a dedicated app for Apple Vision Pro
item.description: When Apple Vision Pro first came out two years ago, YouTube hesitated to release a dedicated app. Today is the day they officially launch one.

item.title: A Wave of Unexplained Bot Traffic Is Sweeping the Web
item.description: From small publishers to US federal agencies, websites are reporting unusual spikes in automated traffic linked to IP addresses in Lanzhou, China.

item.title: OpenAI’s President Gave Millions to Trump. He Says It’s for Humanity
item.description: In an interview with WIRED, Greg Brockman says his political donations support OpenAI's mission—even if some employees at the company disagree.

item.title: Didero lands $30M to put manufacturing procurement on ‘agentic’ autopilot
item.description: Didero functions as an agentic AI layer that sits on top of a company’s existing ERP, acting as a coordinator that reads incoming communications and a...

item.title: Musk needed a new vision for SpaceX and xAI. He landed on Moonbase Alpha.
item.description: "I really want to see a mass driver on the moon that is shooting AI satellites into deep space."

item.title: Special Devices Allowed Crowds at the Deaflympics to Feel the Power of a Judo Slam as Never Before
item.description: While all eyes and ears are on the Winter Olympic games in Milano-Cortina, last summer’s games drew only eyes. At the 2025 Summer Deaflympics, Tokyo e...

item.title: Waymo Asks the DC Public to Pressure Their City Officials
item.description: Stuck in regulatory limbo, the self-driving-vehicle developer is encouraging residents of Washington, DC, to message public officials to help get its ...

item.title: Our Favorite TV Is Still Almost Half Off
item.description: Best Buy continues to sell the TCL QM6K for a staggering discount.

item.title: Hacker linked to Epstein removed from Black Hat cyber conference website
item.description: Emails published by the Justice Department revealed cybersecurity veteran Vincenzo Iozzo emailed, and arranged to meet, Jeffrey Epstein multiple times...

item.title: A Passing ‘Angel’ Rescues Woman 8-Months Pregnant from Her Sinking Car
item.description: A woman some 8-months pregnant has a total stranger to thank for her life, and that of her baby. When she was driving down I-95 in Martin County, Shed...

item.title: One Pan Cheeseburger Rice
item.description: Cheeseburger rice is everything you love about a juicy cheeseburger, made easy in one skillet. Hearty, cheesy, and packed with…

item.title: 3 Ingredient Cool Whip Candy
item.description: This 3 Ingredient Cool Whip Candy tastes just like a Three Musketeers Bar! Fluffy on the inside, smooth chocolate on…

item.title: Fudgy Chocolate Tahini Cookies (1 Bowl!)

item.title: Cajun Spaghetti (Louisiana Spaghetti)
item.description: This Cajun spaghetti is comforting like classic spaghetti but delivers a flavor packed Cajun kick with sausage and a creamy sauce. You’ll…

item.title: Chicken Schnitzel
item.description: You guys are obsessed with my Pork Schnitzel, so I knew I had to make a chicken version! Thin-pounded, lightly…

item.title: Marcella Hazan’s 3 Ingredient Tomato Sauce
item.description: Simple, classic, and downright magical, this iconic Marcella Hazan’s tomato sauce uses only 3 ingredients and proves that less is…

item.title: Vegan Gluten-Free Morning Glory Muffins
item.description: Say hello to morning glory muffins, made vegan + gluten-free ! A classic treat originally created by Pam McKinstry in 1978 at her Nantucket restaurant...

item.title: Best Gluten-Free Pizza in Naples: Top Pizzerias to Try
item.description: If you are gluten-free, you might assume that Naples, the birthplace of pizza, would be difficult, restrictive, or disappointing. The reality is the o...

item.title: What grocery stores reveal about how people eat
item.description: A grocery store is one of the most revealing places you can walk into when travelling. More than restaurants or cafés, it shows how people actually ea...

item.title: What is considered a “normal meal” in different cultures
item.description: People often search for a “normal meal” when they arrive somewhere new. Something familiar enough to feel grounding, but local enough to feel authenti...

item.title: Why lunch is the main meal in some countries
item.description: For many travellers, dinner feels like the main event. It is where expectations concentrate: the moment reserved for something special, social, or mem...

item.title: 63 Essential Things to Know Before Visiting Tokyo
item.description: From trains to table manners, these are the lessons Tokyo quietly teaches travellers. They’re practical, cultural, and often invisible until you get t...

item.title: Creamy Curried Black Eyed Pea Soup
item.description: What’s that? You’d like an easy, delicious soup that practically makes itself and will make all of your wildest dreams come true!? Us too ! We can’t g...

item.title: Tahini Hot Chocolate (Super Dreamy, Protein-Rich!)
item.description: If you’re looking for a decadent, elevated hot chocolate with wholesome ingredients, this one’s for you! We’ve been serving up this frothy, tahini-inf...

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
U.S. productivity slows down in fourth quarter while unit labor costs accelerate
Beyond to buy rights to Buy Buy Baby brand and reunite it with Bed Bath & Beyond
